case_title: WANCHUN ATHENA CHIEN VS. LYDIA BURTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEN, WANCHUN ATHENA AS TO DEFENDANT BURTON, LYDIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED OCT-16-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BURTON, LYDIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEN, WANCHUN ATHENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURTON, LYDIA $386.49 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $466.49, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $386.49 IN UNPAID UTILITY BILLS FROM 05/29/2018 THROUGH 09/07/2018. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $386.49 FILED BY CHIEN, WANCHUN ATHENA AS TO DEFENDANT BURTON, LYDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINAUNCE FOR FILING PROOF OF SERVICE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-15-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WACHUN ATHENA CHIEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYDIA BURTON IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT STANDS ON HER RIGHT FOR PROPER SERVICE. PLAINTIFF STATED SHE DIDN'T FILE HER PROCESS SERVER'S PROOF, WHICH WAS SERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WACHUN ATHENA CHIEN. DEFENDANT LYDIA BURTON DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
